title: Clock out and complete the shift
description: Verify that a user can clock out after starting a shift and the shift is completed on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Clock in from the dashboard
Clock out from the dashboard
Verify the user is shown as clocked out
Verify the shift timer is stopped

title: Clock in and see the shift begin
description: Verify that a user can clock in from the dashboard and the active shift state is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Clock in from the dashboard
Verify the user is shown as clocked in
Verify the live shift timer is running

title: Clock in from the dashboard
description: Verify that a user can start a shift from the dashboard and see the app enter clocked-in mode with a running timer.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the clock in and out control
Verify the dashboard shows that the shift is active
Verify the live timer begins counting up

title: Save a shift and review it in logs
description: Verify that a completed clock in and clock out shift appears in Logs with a recorded daily history entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Clock in from the dashboard
Clock out from the dashboard
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the completed shift appears in the daily history table
Verify the monthly summary includes the recorded attendance

title: Completed shift appears in logs
description: Verify that a completed shift is saved and shown in the logs history after clocking out.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the clock in and out control
Click the clock in and out control again
Click the logs tab
Verify the completed shift appears in the history table
Verify the daily history entry shows recorded attendance data

title: Switch between all main app sections
description: Verify that a user can move between Dashboard, Settings, and Logs from the bottom navigation and each section becomes active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Verify the dashboard content is displayed
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Verify the settings content is displayed
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the logs content is displayed

title: Clocked-in state persists while navigating tabs
description: Verify that a started shift remains active when the user switches between dashboard, settings, and logs.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the clock in and out control
Click the settings tab
Click the dashboard tab
Click the logs tab
Verify the active shift state is still reflected in the app shell
Verify the live timer remains available for the active shift

title: Open the logs section from the main shell
description: Verify that a user can open Logs directly from the main shell and the logs/history view is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the logs content is displayed
Verify the logs tab is active

title: Timer updates while a shift remains active
description: Verify that the live shift timer keeps updating after clock-in until the user clocks out.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the clock in and out control
Wait for the live timer to update
Verify the timer value has advanced
Verify the shift is still active

title: Timer stops after clock out
description: Verify that the live shift timer stops changing once the user ends the shift.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the clock in and out control
Wait for the live timer to update
Click the clock in and out control again
Wait for the live timer to update again
Verify the timer no longer advances after clock out
Verify the shift is no longer active

title: View monthly summary and daily history in logs
description: Verify that the logs page shows monthly attendance totals and the daily history table for recorded attendance.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Verify the monthly summary is displayed
Verify the daily history table is displayed

title: View monthly attendance totals on Logs
description: Verify that a user can open Logs and see the monthly attendance summary for their recorded time.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Verify monthly summary totals are displayed

title: Log a sick leave entry from the dashboard
description: Verify that a user can create a sick leave attendance record from the dashboard and see it in Logs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Create a sick leave quick log from the dashboard
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the special attendance record appears in the history table
Verify the recorded day is shown in the logs summary

title: Review daily attendance history columns
description: Verify that a user can open Logs and review the daily history table for recorded attendance entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Verify the daily history table is displayed
Verify the table includes date, shift, in, out, and total information

title: Log a vacation entry from the dashboard
description: Verify that a user can create a vacation attendance record from the dashboard and see it in Logs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Create a vacation quick log from the dashboard
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the special attendance record appears in the history table
Verify the logs summary reflects the recorded entry

title: Show logs history with monthly summary and daily table
description: Verify that a user can review attendance history in Logs with the monthly summary and daily columns visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the monthly summary is displayed
Verify the daily history table is displayed

title: Switch from Logs to other app sections
description: Verify that a user can move from Logs to Dashboard and Settings and continue using the app shell normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Click the tab to open Dashboard
Click the tab to open Settings
Verify the Settings view is displayed
Verify the app navigation remains available

title: Keep theme selection after switching sections
description: Verify that a user can toggle the theme and the chosen appearance remains consistent while navigating through the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme setting
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the selected theme is still applied
Verify the interface remains readable in the selected theme

title: Log overtime from the dashboard
description: Verify that an overtime quick action creates a saved attendance record for the current day.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the overtime quick action
Click the logs tab
Verify an overtime entry appears in the history table
Verify the special attendance record is shown in logs

title: Inspect past attendance entries by scrolling the history
description: Verify that a user can scroll through Logs and continue reviewing older attendance entries in the history table.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Scroll through the daily history table
Verify past attendance entries remain visible in the history table

title: Log remote work from the dashboard
description: Verify that a remote work quick action creates a saved attendance record for the current day.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Click the remote work quick action
Click the logs tab
Verify a remote work entry appears in the history table
Verify the special attendance record is shown in logs

title: Switch the interface language and text direction
description: Verify that a user can toggle between English and Arabic and the text direction changes accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the language setting
Verify the interface language changes
Verify the text direction changes appropriately

title: Keep the selected language while navigating the app
description: Verify that a user can switch to Arabic or English and the selection remains in place while moving through the main tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the language setting
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify the selected language remains applied
Verify the layout direction remains consistent

title: Configure geofence settings and keep them after returning
description: Verify that a user can save geofence coordinates and radius in Settings and the values remain after navigating away and back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Fill in a valid latitude value in the geofence coordinates field
Fill in a valid longitude value in the geofence coordinates field
Fill in a valid radius value in the geofence radius field
Save the settings
Click the Dashboard section in the bottom navigation
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Verify the saved geofence settings are displayed
Verify the geofence radius is retained

title: Save geofence location settings
description: The user can enter valid workplace coordinates and radius, save them, and see the settings remain available afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Enter a valid latitude value
Enter a valid longitude value
Enter a valid radius value
Save the location settings
Verify the geofence settings are retained
Verify the saved location configuration is displayed

title: Configure shift threshold times and keep them after returning
description: Verify that a user can save shift threshold times in Settings and the values remain after navigating away and back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Fill in valid start time values for the shift thresholds
Fill in valid end time values for the shift thresholds
Save the settings
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Verify the saved shift threshold settings are displayed
Verify the shift threshold values are retained

title: Save custom shift thresholds
description: The user can change all shift window times, save them, and see the updated schedule remain available afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Change the Shift 1 start time
Change the Shift 1 end time
Change the Shift 2 start time
Change the Shift 2 end time
Change the Shift 3 start time
Change the Shift 3 end time
Save the threshold settings
Verify the updated shift schedule is retained

title: Review vacation balance in the monthly summary
description: Verify that a user can open Logs and see vacation-related monthly summary information alongside attendance totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Verify monthly summary totals are displayed
Verify vacation balance information is displayed

title: Detect current location and save geofence settings
description: The user can autofill geofence coordinates from the browser location service and save the detected location settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Detect the current location
Verify the coordinates are autofilled
Enter a valid radius value
Save the location settings
Verify the geofence settings are retained

title: Use current location to populate geofence settings
description: Verify that a user can detect the current location from Settings and the geofence fields are populated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Trigger current location detection
Verify the geofence coordinates are populated
Verify the detected location can be used in the settings form

title: Toggle auto-detect location preference
description: The user can turn automatic location detection on or off and see the preference state change in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Toggle automatic location detection
Verify the auto-detect location preference state changes

title: Show validation feedback for invalid geofence values
description: Verify that a user sees validation feedback when entering invalid geofence coordinates or radius in Settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Fill invalid latitude and longitude values in the geofence fields
Fill an invalid radius value in the geofence radius field
Attempt to save the settings
Verify a geofence validation error is visible

title: Show validation feedback for malformed shift threshold times
description: Verify that a user sees validation feedback when entering malformed shift threshold times in Settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings section in the bottom navigation
Fill malformed start time values for the shift thresholds
Fill malformed end time values for the shift thresholds
Attempt to save the settings
Verify a shift threshold validation error is visible

title: Toggle notifications preference
description: The user can turn notifications on or off and see the preference state change in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Toggle notifications
Verify the notifications preference state changes

title: Toggle vibration preference
description: The user can turn vibration on clock in or out on or off and see the preference state change in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Toggle vibration on clock in or out
Verify the vibration preference state changes

title: Show an empty history state with no recorded attendance
description: Verify that Logs displays an empty state when there are no saved attendance records.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Logs section in the bottom navigation
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify the history table is not populated

title: Reject invalid geofence values
description: The user sees validation feedback and cannot save when geofence coordinates or radius are outside valid bounds.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Enter an invalid latitude value
Enter an invalid longitude value
Enter an invalid radius value
Save the location settings
Verify geofence validation errors are visible

title: See an empty history state when no records exist
description: Verify that a user opening Logs with no saved attendance history sees a clear empty state instead of a table of records.

steps.description: Navigate to /#logs
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no daily history entries are shown

title: Reject malformed shift threshold times
description: The user sees validation feedback and cannot save when shift threshold times are malformed or incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /#settings
Enter a malformed Shift 1 start time
Enter a malformed Shift 1 end time
Save the threshold settings
Verify shift threshold validation errors are visible
